modules.name: WORBI
modules.summary: Local-first worldbuilding workspace for lore, characters, locations, timelines, notes, and project planning.

overview.body: WORBI is a browser-based worldbuilding tool packaged as a Nymph module. It is designed for writers, game developers, solo creators, and teams who need a local project bible for fictional worlds and production notes.
works_with: Blender/Unity/Unreal projects as external reference material
requirements: Local WebView2 or browser access to the WORBI web app

modules.name: Z-Image Turbo
modules.summary: Local Z-Image Turbo image generation backend using the Nunchaku runtime.

modules.name: TRELLIS.2
modules.summary: Local TRELLIS.2 GGUF 3D generation backend with model fetch and smoke-test hooks.

modules.name: Pixal3D
modules.summary: Local Pixal3D image-to-3D module with Gradio testing and future Blender addon API hooks.

overview.body:
Pixal3D is a research image-to-3D module for generating textured GLB assets from a single image.

Before installing or fetching model files, review the upstream terms:
- Tencent's Pixal3D license is academic-only and says not to use Pixal3D for commercial or production purposes.
- Tencent's Pixal3D license says Pixal3D is not intended for use within the European Union.
- The BRIA RMBG-2.0 background-removal model is gated on Hugging Face and requires the access form link below to be completed with the same Hugging Face account used by the module token.
- BRIA lists the Hugging Face weights as non-commercial; commercial BRIA use requires a separate BRIA agreement/API.

NymphsCore Manager must show these terms before install/fetch and require explicit user acknowledgement before downloading gated or restricted assets.
requirements: Hugging Face token with BRIA RMBG-2.0 access accepted

modules.name: Brain
modules.summary: Local assistant, llama-server, Open WebUI, and MCP orchestration stack.

modules.name: LoRA
modules.summary: AI Toolkit powered Z-Image Turbo LoRA training sidecar for datasets, jobs, and generated adapters.
